2606.19827.title: When, Where, and How: Adaptive Binning for Tabular Self-Supervised Learning
2606.19827.paper_summary: Medical tabular data are ubiquitous in clinical research, but deep learning for tables remains underexplored because reliable labels often require costly expert adjudication, even though structured clinical variables are routinely available in tabular form. Self-supervised learning can leverage these unlabeled tables, and recent binning-based pretexts offer a promising inductive bias, but existing objectives fix a single global quantile discretization and apply feature-agnostic supervision. We propose Adaptive Binning, a training-adaptive discretization pretext for tabular SSL that couples discretization to learning through a feature-wise coarse-to-fine curriculum. Motivated by the spectral bias of neural networks and the principles of curriculum learning, our method progressively refines discretization per feature upon plateau detection and selects representation-aware splits to jointly improve value-space concentration and representation-space coherence. A heterogeneity-aware objective unifies categorical reconstruction with ordinal supervision for numerical features, and experiments on public medical tabular datasets under unified evaluation protocols show consistent gains for linear probing and fine-tuning without dataset-specific discretization tuning. We further introduce a medical tabular SSL benchmark with standardized protocols to support reproducible progress in this underexplored domain. Our code is available at https://github.com/labhai/Adaptive-Binning.
2606.19827.paper_summary_zh: 醫療表格數據在臨床研究中無處不在，但表格的深度學習仍然未被充分探索，因為可靠的標籤通常需要昂貴的專家裁定，即使結構化的臨床變量通常以表格形式提供。自我監督學習可以利用這些未標記的表格，而最近基於分箱的預訓練方法提供了有希望的歸納偏差，但現有的目標固定了單一的全局分位數離散化並應用特徵無關的監督。我們提出了自適應分箱，這是一種訓練自適應的離散化預訓練方法，將離散化與學習結合，通過特徵的粗到細課程進行。受到神經網絡的光譜偏差和課程學習原則的啟發，我們的方法在檢測到平臺後逐步細化每個特徵的離散化，並選擇具有表示意識的分割來共同改善值空間的集中度和表示空間的一致性。一個考慮異質性的目標將類別重建與數值特徵的序數監督統一，並且在統一評估協議下對公共醫療表格數據集的實驗顯示，線性探測和微調的一致增益，而無需特定數據集的離散化調整。我們進一步引入了一個醫療表格自我監督學習基準，配備標準化協議，以支持在這個未被充分探索的領域中可重複的進展。我們的代碼可在 https://github.com/labhai/Adaptive-Binning 獲得。
2606.19827.author: Daehwan Kim et.al.
2606.19827.authors: Daehwan Kim, Haejun Chung, Ikbeom Jang
